channel.title: Martenweave Blog
channel.description: Practical notes on SAP migration, MDM, data governance, lineage, impact, and deterministic validation.

item.title: SAP MDG Manages Master Data. Who Manages the Implementation Knowledge?
item.description: Why SAP MDG needs a connected implementation-knowledge layer for mappings, decisions, evidence, and controlled change.

item.title: Why SAP Migration Mapping Spreadsheets Break Down
item.description: Why mapping spreadsheets break down in SAP migration and how a controlled model layer reduces repeated reconciliation.

item.title: How to Detect Dataset Gaps Before SAP Migration Testing
item.description: How to compare representative datasets with an approved model before SAP migration testing begins.

item.title: How to Perform Impact Analysis for an SAP Field Change
item.description: A practical guide to tracing downstream effects before changing an SAP field, mapping, rule, or value list.

item.title: How to Trace a Legacy Field to an SAP Target Field
item.description: How to trace a legacy field through mappings, business attributes, and SAP target endpoints.

item.title: How Deterministic Validation Reduces Migration Risk
item.description: Why deterministic validation makes migration model risk visible before derived indexes and reports are published.

item.title: How to Build an Evidence-Based Migration Readiness Report
item.description: How to build readiness reporting that connects claims to model baselines, evidence, ownership, and decisions.

item.title: How Deterministic Model Validation Works
item.description: How deterministic model validation works and why semantic authority must remain explicit and reviewable.
